auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to your business dashboard.
auth.registerSubtitle: You can start adding products and recording sales in under a minute.

access.deniedMessage: Your role cannot open this page.

dashboard.subtitle: Here's how {org} is doing today.
dashboard.grossProfitHint: Sales margin before rent, salaries, etc.
dashboard.salesSoFar: {count, plural, one {# sale so far} other {# sales so far}}
dashboard.dailyTotals: Daily totals over the last {days} days.
dashboard.topProductsDesc: By revenue over the last {days} days.
dashboard.noSalesPeriod: No sales yet in this period.
dashboard.noTopProducts: No product sales in this period.
dashboard.noSalesRecorded: No sales recorded in this period yet.
dashboard.allStocked: Everything is stocked above the minimum — nice work.
dashboard.noLowStock: All products are above minimum stock.
dashboard.insightsDesc: Smart tips from your sales and inventory — no extra setup required.

team.title: Team
team.subtitle: Add employees with their work email and an initial password. They sign in on the same login page as you.
team.name: Display name
team.passwordHint: Share this securely with the employee. They can use Supabase password reset if enabled on your project.
team.createdToast: Employee created — they can sign in now.
team.empty: Only you are listed. Add shop staff below.
team.roleShopManager: Shop manager — dashboard, AI, POS, inventory, customers, sales
team.roleInventoryManager: Inventory manager — categories and products only
team.ownerNoEdit: Owner role cannot be changed here.

pos.customerListHint: All customers are listed below. Search to narrow the list.
pos.tapToAdd: Tap products to add them here
pos.addProductFirst: Add at least one product to the sale
pos.noCustomers: No customers yet. Add one from the Customers page first.
pos.noProductsInventory: No products found. Add items in Inventory first.
pos.customerSheetHint: Search by name or phone, then tap a customer to attach them to this sale.
pos.discountSheetHint: Enter a fixed discount in ETB. It is applied after line totals.
pos.customerRequiredCredit: Select a customer for pay-later sales
pos.depositInvalid: Deposit must be greater than 0 and less than the total

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.subtitle: Manage products, pricing, and stock. Changes sync to the dashboard and POS.
inventory.noMatchHint: Adjust the filters above or add your first product to start tracking inventory.
inventory.categoriesDesc: Group products for POS tabs and filters.
inventory.deleteCategoryConfirm: Delete "{name}"? Products in this category will lose their category link.
inventory.noCategoriesHint: No categories yet — add one above.
inventory.dialogDesc: Prices are in ETB. Sell price must be at least the buy price.
inventory.archiveConfirm: Archive this product? It will be hidden from POS but past sales stay intact.
inventory.profitHintEmpty: Profit per unit appears here once both prices are set.

expenses.title: Operating expenses
expenses.subtitle: Record daily costs — rent, salaries, transport, and other running expenses. These reduce net profit on your dashboard.
expenses.filterDesc: Filter expenses by when money was spent.
expenses.pageSummary: {total, plural, one {# expense} other {# expenses}} · {amount} total in period
expenses.empty: No expenses in this period. Add rent, salaries, or transport costs.
expenses.categoriesDesc: Group costs — rent, salaries, transport, and custom types.
expenses.noCategoriesHint: No categories yet — add one above, or they appear automatically on first visit.
expenses.deleteCategoryConfirm: Delete "{name}"? You cannot delete a category that still has expenses.
expenses.categoriesLoadError: Could not load categories. Check your connection and try again.

customers.title: Customers
customers.subtitle: Repeat buyers, contact info, and purchase history.
customers.empty: No customers yet. Add one or record sales with a customer in POS.
customers.deleteConfirm: Delete "{name}"? Past sales will keep their records.
customers.name: Name
customers.paymentAmountInvalid: Enter an amount up to the balance due

sales.title: Sales
sales.subtitle: Searchable register of every checkout from POS.
sales.empty: No sales in this period. Record your first sale in <link>POS</link>.
sales.profitLine: {count, plural, one {# item} other {# items}} · Profit {amount}

assistant.title: AI Business Assistant
assistant.subtitle: Ask about sales trends, inventory, top products, and revenue — grounded in your live business summary.
assistant.connectDesc: Paste your API key in settings to start chatting. Keys stay on the server — never in the browser.
assistant.settingsDesc: Your OpenRouter API key is encrypted and stored on the server. It is never sent to the browser after saving.
assistant.apiKeyHint: Stored encrypted on the server. Leave blank to keep the existing key.
assistant.inputPlaceholder: Ask about sales, inventory, or revenue…
assistant.disclaimer: AI can make mistakes. Verify important business decisions.
assistant.startNewChatHint: No conversations yet. Start a new chat.

prompts.0: What were my top products last month?
prompts.1: Which items are low on stock?
prompts.2: How is revenue trending this week?

landing.badge: Built for small shops & mini markets
landing.hero: Sell faster. Track smarter. Grow with confidence.
landing.heroSubtitle: A modern point-of-sale and business operations platform designed for buy-and-resell SMEs. Instant POS, real-time inventory, customer history, and AI-driven insights — all in one clean dashboard.
landing.feature1Desc: Find any product in two keystrokes. Add to cart, checkout, done — optimized for touch and keyboard.
landing.feature2Desc: Stock decrements automatically on every sale. Low-stock alerts so you never run out.
landing.feature3Desc: Daily revenue, profit margins, top-selling products, and AI-driven recommendations.
landing.footer: © {year} SME Ops Platform — built with Next.js, NestJS, and Prisma.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
